title: Wynn Resorts Finally Agreed To Pay To Investors Over Its CEO Misconduct Scandal
author: triflingtendency13
selftext:
Hey guys, here are probably some investors in Wynn, so I guess this might be useful info for you. It’s about its CEO's sexual misconduct scandal they had a few years ago.



For newbies, back in 2018, Wynn was accused of covering up that its CEO (Steve Wynn) had a history of sexual misconduct with Wynn Resorts employees. It was also said that they hid this information to avoid more regulatory scrutiny and to protect the CEO’s position. Obviously, when this came out, $WYNN fell, and investors sued the company. 



Fast forward till today, Steve Wynn was recently fined $10 million and people who presented a lawsuit against him for this harassment situation settled last year.



For investors, the good news is that Wynn Resorts finally agreed to pay them over this whole situation. So if you bought WYNN back then, you can check the details and [file for the payment here](https://11thestate.com/cases/wynnresorts-investor-settlement).



Anyways, did you know about this Wynn scandal? And, has anyone here been affected by this? How much were your losses if so?
